name: Laboratory Exhaust Fan - Model LEF-3000
description: High plume dilution exhaust fan for laboratory fume hood exhaust
pdf_content:
LABORATORY EXHAUST FAN SUBMITTAL
Project: University Science Building

FAN SPECIFICATIONS
Manufacturer: LabVent Corporation
Model: LEF-3000-HPD
Type: Centrifugal Upblast Exhaust Fan
Application: Laboratory Fume Hood Exhaust

PERFORMANCE DATA
Airflow: 3,000 CFM @ 2.5" w.g. ESP
Fan Speed: 1,750 RPM
Outlet Velocity: 3,500 FPM minimum
Plume Height: 2.0 x building height
Stack Height: 10 feet above roof

MOTOR SPECIFICATIONS
Horsepower: 5 HP
Voltage: 460V/3PH/60Hz
Efficiency: Premium efficient, 93.0%
Enclosure: TEFC, chemical duty
VFD Compatible: Inverter duty rated
Service Factor: 1.15

CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS
Fan Housing: FRP (fiberglass reinforced plastic)
Impeller: FRP with Hastelloy shaft
Bearings: Sealed, L10 life >100,000 hrs
Vibration Isolation: Spring isolators, 95% efficiency
Drain Connection: 1" CPVC with trap
Access Door: Gasketed, lockable

SAFETY FEATURES
Belt Guard: OSHA compliant
Vibration Switch: Shuts down at 0.5"/sec
Bearing Temperature Sensors: RTD type
Differential Pressure Monitor: Across fan
Motor Overload Protection: Built-in

CHEMICAL RESISTANCE
Corrosion Resistance: Suitable for acids, bases
Temperature Limit: 140°F continuous
Special Coating: Vinyl ester resin

SOUND DATA
Sound Power Level: 85 dBA
Sound Pressure @ 10 ft: 72 dBA

COMMISSIONING REQUIREMENTS
• Verify fan rotation and check for reverse flow
• Measure exhaust airflow using duct traverse
• Verify minimum stack outlet velocity (3,500 FPM)
• Check vibration levels (<0.15 in/sec)
• Test VFD operation from minimum to maximum speed
• Verify interlock with laboratory controls
• Test failure mode (fan failure alarm)
• Check bearing temperatures at full load
• Verify drainage system functionality
• Perform plume dilution study
• Test emergency bypass operation
• Document TAB report with certified measurements

Compliance: ANSI/AIHA Z9.5, NFPA 45
Submittal Date: February 25, 2024
By: Laboratory Systems Contractor
